There is no direct 'Combination A' in the ground-truth list, so we must infer which base plans this combination most closely corresponds to. These features align most closely with the highest-tier options (Premium-level plans) from the ground-truth data. For health coverage, the premium options available are PrimeCare Premium Plan and EliteCare Premium Plan, both rated 6. For property coverage, the premium tier equivalents are PrimeHome Premium Coverage and EliteHome Premium Coverage, both rated 6. For travel coverage, the premium-level options are PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rating 6) and EliteTravel Premium Plan (rating 5). Since all these share the same 'premium' tier and the AI combined them into one 'Enhanced Value Option6', the consistent mapping is to the Prime-tier premium plans with rating 6 (because 'Option6' matches the rating 6 pattern). Therefore, we map: health coverage → PrimeCare Premium Plan (6), property coverage → PrimeHome Premium Coverage (6), travel coverage → PrimeTravel Premium Plan (6).
